name: Peanut Butter Tater Candy
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil the potato with skin on until tender.
2. Peel the potato and remove any eyes or spots.
3. Mash the potato thoroughly with a fork or electric mixer at slow speed.
4. Add vanilla to the mashed potato.
5. Gradually add confectioners' sugar, using a fork as the mixture begins to firm up, until it forms a ball.
6. Turn out the ball onto a surface dusted with confectioners' sugar.
7. Roll the ball out flat and oblong until it is 1/4-inch thick.
8. Spread peanut butter evenly over the flat surface.
9. Sprinkle chopped peanuts (if using) evenly over the peanut butter.
10. Cut the flat surface in half the short way.
11. Roll the pieces jelly-roll fashion, sealing the edges. Make two rolls total.
12. Place the rolls in the refrigerator until chilled and firm.
13. Slice into 1/3-inch pieces. Keep refrigerated until ready to serve.
